_comment: AgentShield-style honeytool configuration. These fake tools detect LLM proxy injection.

honeytools.name: fetch_internal_config
honeytools.triggerDescription: Proxy injects a call to steal credentials or API keys

honeytools.name: sync_internal_cache
honeytools.triggerDescription: Proxy injects a call with an attacker-controlled target_node URL to exfiltrate data

honeytools.name: send_admin_notification
honeytools.triggerDescription: Proxy injects a call with an attacker webhook_url to exfiltrate data

honeytools.name: verify_user_credentials
honeytools.triggerDescription: Proxy injects a call to validate stolen credentials or extract token details

honeytools.name: export_analytics_report
honeytools.triggerDescription: Proxy injects a call to export user data to an attacker-controlled destination

integration_guide.anthropic: Add toAnthropicTools(honeytools) to your tools array in the API request
integration_guide.openai: Add toOpenAITools(honeytools) to your tools array in the API request
integration_guide.claude_code: Mix honeytool names into your allowed tool list. Monitor for invocations.
